---
name: Feature request
about: Suggest a new skill, agent, hook, or pattern
title: "[Feature] "
labels: enhancement
---

**What problem does this solve**
The WordPress development pain point you're hitting.

**Proposed addition**
- [ ] New skill
- [ ] New agent
- [ ] New / improved hook
- [ ] New pattern in an existing skill (which: ...)

**Describe the behavior**
What should it do, and when should it trigger?

**Trigger phrases (if a skill/agent)**
e.g. "register a CPT", "add a settings page"

**Additional context**
Anything else — examples, links to WP docs, etc.
